risinfo.chaptertitle: Appendix II. Test Your Knowledge! Answer Key

sect1.title: Chapter 19
sect1.para: 1. b. False. Synchronous communication occurs in realtime. Email correspondence is an example of asynchronous communication.

2. d. All of the above. Documentation elements specific to telemedicine services include consent to receive the service via telemedicine, platform or modality used, and patient and physician locations. Additional documentation may include individuals present with the patient, time of service, and any digital technology used (eg, digital otoscope).
3. c. Modifier 95 is 1 of 2 telemedicine modifiers found in CPT. Answers a and b (02 and 10) are POS codes.

listitem.para: HCPCS codes G0508 and G0509 most specifically describe critical care services when provided via telemedicine. CPT instructs to report unlisted E/M service code 99499 for critical care provided via telemedicine.

sect1.para: 5. b. The service is reported using the code for the type of telemedicine service by which most of the service was provided.
